Structure of Enter the name of the grammar

Reserved Words

Enter the name of the grammar has a total of 0 reserved words.

 

Special Symbols

Enter the name of the grammar has a total of 12 special symbols.

- ) / < <> >
( * + <= == >=

Syntax

nl :
  NewLine nl
  NewLine

nl-Opt :
  NewLine nl-Opt
  null

Start :
  nl-Opt Program

Program :
  null

Expression :
  Expression > Add-Exp
  Expression < Add-Exp
  Expression <= Add-Exp
  Expression >= Add-Exp
  Expression == Add-Exp
  Expression <> Add-Exp
  Add-Exp

Add-Exp :
  Add-Exp + Mult-Exp
  Add-Exp - Mult-Exp
  Mult-Exp

Mult-Exp :
  Mult-Exp * Negate-Exp
  Mult-Exp / Negate-Exp
  Negate-Exp

Negate-Exp :
  - Value
  Value

Value :
  Identifier
  ( Expression )

Parse Tables

Symbol Table

Index Name Type
0 (EOF) End of File
1 (Error) Runtime Error Symbol
2 Whitespace Noise
3 '-' Content
4 '(' Content
5 ')' Content
6 '*' Content
7 '/' Content
8 '+' Content
9 '<' Content
10 '<=' Content
11 '<>' Content
12 '==' Content
13 '>' Content
14 '>=' Content
15 Identifier Content
16 NewLine Content
17 StringLiteral Content
18 <Add Exp> Nonterminal
19 <Expression> Nonterminal
20 <Mult Exp> Nonterminal
21 <Negate Exp> Nonterminal
22 <nl> Nonterminal
23 <nl Opt> Nonterminal
24 <Program> Nonterminal
25 <Start> Nonterminal
26 <Value> Nonterminal

Lexical Group Table

Name Container Start End Advance Ending Nesting
